programme.desc: Kathy warns Nick not to say anything about Dave and Kim's affair. Kim meets Nick and he demands money so that he can support Alice in return for his silence.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim panics when Frank calls the police about Nick. Caroline visits Nick in intensive care. Dave finally tells Kim what he thinks of her.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Mason is called to help Evelyn, a widow who is receiving threats from a corrupt associate of her late husband. Her son-in-law Alan is reluctant to sever his ties with the crook, knowing he provides vital revenue - which forces her into silence. But the police urge Evelyn to cooperate after her car is run off the road and her grandson goes missing. Meanwhile, a Polish visitor arrives in search of a long-lost love.(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.sub-title: A Breath of French Air - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Dispirited by a wet English summer, the Larkins cross the Channel in the hope that the French way of life will have a beneficial effect on the family. David Jason, Pam Ferris and Catherine Zeta-Jones star.(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby lets a room to a young couple he believes have just got married - unaware that they are not man and wife. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A blizzard forces the sleuthing spinster to spend a night in isolated Sittaford House, situated on a Devon moor. Without explanation, the building's owner, up-and-coming politician Clive Trevelyan, decides to spend the evening in a local hotel - only for a Ouija board to predict his murder. Mystery drama with an all-star cast, including Geraldine McEwan, Robert Hardy, Matthew Kelly, Patricia Hodge and Mel Smith.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dawson helps the officers investigate antiques dealer Mr Brigstocke, who is accused of selling stolen goods. Mason and Wetherby stake out the shop to catch him red-handed, but the situation becomes life-threatening when Brigstocke sets fire to it. Meanwhile, prejudices are stirred by the arrival of some Taoist monks and tragedy strikes local troublemakers Julie and Eddie Tinniswood. With Clare Wille and Joe McFadden.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Dingles argue about their new business venture. Nick regains consciousness in the hospital. Kim manipulates Frank into offering Nick his job back when he is better.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy goes to visit Nick in hospital. Tina cleans the house in preparation for inspection. Dave insists he had nothing to do with Nick's accident. Chris asks Rachel to marry him.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve gives Vicky an engagement ring. Don drives the Duckworths to the funeral. Vicky stuns the guests at the party when she announces that she and Steve are engaged.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz doesn't think Steve and Vicky will be happy together. Alec arrives at the Rovers to sort Vicky out. Bet tells him she is certain Steve is after Vicky's money.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A gathering at the Devon estate of Miss Marple's old school friend Lady Tressilian leads to murder when the eccentric Mr Treves tells the story of an unconvicted child killer. Miss Marple is on hand to assist Supt Mallard of the local constabulary, but not before a second victim is claimed. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, with guest appearances by Eileen Atkins, Tom Baker, Paul Nicholls, Alan Davies and Greg Wise, with a cameo by former British number-one tennis player Greg Rusedski.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dawson helps the officers investigate antiques dealer Mr Brigstocke, who is accused of selling stolen goods. Mason and Wetherby stake out the shop to catch him red-handed, but the situation becomes life-threatening when Brigstocke sets fire to it. Meanwhile, prejudices are stirred by the arrival of some Taoist monks and tragedy strikes local troublemakers Julie and Eddie Tinniswood. With Clare Wille and Joe McFadden.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A dentist falls in love with his young assistant. His anxious wife, believing he has made plans to poison her and thereby remove the main obstacle to happiness, calls for Poirot's help. Drama, starring David Suchet.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A wealthy banker goes missing while walking from his country house to the village post office. Poirot, who has acquired a parrot and developed a taste for conjuring tricks, bets the baffled Inspector Japp Â£5 he can solve the mystery without leaving his own apartment. David Suchet stars.(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: An idyllic summer day in Oxford is torn asunder when a parcel bomb claims the life of eminent mathematician Adam Capstone, a genius in the field of 'Knot Theory'. As Lewis and Hathaway investigate, they discover that, while the victim's academic reputation was beyond reproach, his private life was far more dubious. It emerges Capstone was a man of carnal appetites, who had a string of affairs with young students, betraying his chemistry professor wife Elizabeth, providing her with a clear motive to do away with her cheating spouse. As the detectives work to identify the killer bomber, the case becomes a personal challenge for Lewis, who fears he may not be rewarded with another contract should he fail to impress Moody before his six-month trip to New Zealand. Detective drama, starring Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox, with Zoe Tapper, Tristam Summers and Oliver Lansley.(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The team are sent to Spain with orders to persuade a woman to return home to her father. Robert Vaughn and Nyree Dawn Porter star.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Quincy stumbles upon a plot devised by a group of Nazi war criminals to use an Egyptian mummy to smuggle rare gems from Cairo to Los Angeles.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: An undercover cop kills a Puerto Rican teenager in self-defence, leading to demands for his dismissal from the Hispanic community and the threat of violence on the streets.(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates a twisted tale of rock 'n' roll, meditation and murder. Anna Carteret and Trevor Bannister guest star, with Roger Moore.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is conned into buying a dodgy greyhound and lumbered with a pile of knocked-off videos, and it is up to Terry to save him from a fate worse than death. Vintage drama, starring Dennis Waterman, George Cole and Patrick Malahide.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: When a CIA agent dies after being thrown off a balcony, the unit sets up a fake arms deal with the German terrorist cell responsible. However, the gunrunners uncover the ploy, kidnap Bodie and transform him into a walking time-bomb. Lewis Collins stars.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Guest stars Eric Morecambe and Ernie Wise are entrusted to guard a consignment of heart pills by the girlfriend of the eminent research chemist developing the medicine. Before long, the comedy duo find themselves pursued by Middle Eastern operatives intent on procuring the new drug, as well as Sweeney officers who are trying to protect them. With John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The coroner is hired as technical adviser on a movie inspired by a famous homicide case, and becomes convinced the real murderer is still at large.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A cop appears to have accidentally killed his own partner, but Theo thinks he may be covering for his drug-addicted girlfriend. Guest starring Lynn Redgrave and Morgan Fairchild.(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Gambled with Life
programme.desc: An engineer hatches a plan to immortalise people by freezing them and bringing them back to life, and decides Simon Templar would make the ideal guinea pig.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.sub-title: Give Us This Day Arthur Daley's Bread
programme.desc: Arthur employs a truck-load of ex-cons as cheap labour for his new landscape gardening business and things go swimmingly - until a series of thefts puts paid to the enterprise and he finds himself out of pocket. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle considers his future in CI5 after it transpires the father of his fiancee is under surveillance by the unit, suspected of being part of an international drug-smuggling ring. Patricia Hodge guest stars, with Martin Shaw.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: An apparently respected gynaecologist's suitcase is stolen, but he is reluctant to reveal its contents. On further investigation the squad learns he was in the process of smuggling untaxed money out of the country and that a glamorous Latin woman with criminal connections, may hold the key to its whereabouts.(n)

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Featuring a family farm making jam for the Queen's breakfast table, a Sheffield man producing classic safety razors, a bed-maker using recycled bottles to make mattresses, and a British clockmaker paying tribute to a man that changed the course of history. Ricky Tomlinson narrates.(n)

programme.title: Giant Lobster Hunters
programme.desc: The Bold Contender and Skipper Squizzy head south to Port Davey for one last roll of the dice, but Glenn and the crew of Ansons Bay are also fishing in the same area.(n)

programme.title: The Untouchables (1987)
programme.desc: Incorruptible federal agent Eliot Ness is assigned the task of fighting organised crime in Prohibition-era Chicago and bringing the notorious crime boss Al Capone to justice. Aware crooked police are undermining his investigations, he puts together his own elite squad to take on the Mob. Brian De Palma's crime thriller, with Kevin Costner, Robert De Niro, Andy Garcia and Sean Connery, who won an Oscar for his performance.(n)

With Dolph Lundgren, Talia Shire, Carl Weathers and Brigitte Nielsen.(n)

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A profile of a family making traditional haggis, revealing the dish may not have come from Scotland after all. programme.title: You Only Live Twice (1967)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.sub-title: A Shield for Murder - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. A politician tries to stop Theo pursuing a connection between an attempted murder and a woman in prison for killing her mother. Guest starring Geraldine Page.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Strange, seemingly malevolent encoded messages sour a wealthy man's wedded bliss, prompting him to seek Holmes's expertise. Victorian mystery, starring Jeremy Brett and David Burke.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur makes a hasty agreement to stage a burglary after his tailor's staff go on strike demanding more pay. The bumbling safecracker he hires blows himself up, leaving Arthur and Terry with the task of liberating him from hospital before his bandages are removed and the duo can be linked with the botched crime.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle teams up with a Hong Kong cop, who is in London trailing a Triad gang supplying drugs to US army personnel in Germany while operating an international protection racket. Meanwhile, Bodie goes undercover as a down-and-out in a squat where two young drug addicts have died. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A security guard is murdered during a payroll snatch, and Regan and Carter are called in to support local investigating officers. However, bad blood between the maverick detective inspector and the force's chief superintendent going back several years manifests itself in an old allegation of corruption being rekindled. Richard Griffiths features alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman in the final episode of the crime drama.(n)

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look at how fields of yellow rapeseed flowers are turned into a kitchen cupboard staple, and a man who turned his passion for snowboarding into a company creating custom boards. Plus, the Bolton trainer factory with a racing pedigree, and how a Liverpudlian leather dynasty is producing traditional satchels that are sent around the world.(n)

programme.title: Fishing Allstars
programme.desc: Dean Macey and Adam Rooney visit three diverse venues across England. They first target barbel on the River Trent alongside Matt Godfrey, before switching their attention to carp on the Grand Union Canal, and finally teaming up with Tom Dove and Steve Ringer at Earlswood Lake.(n)

programme.title: Rocky V (1990)
programme.desc: The heavyweight champion is forced into retirement due to brain damage inflicted in the ring, and finds his fortune has been lost on the stock market by his accountant. Returning to his working-class roots, he trains an up-and-coming fighter, only to see his protege turn against him. Drama sequel, starring Sylvester Stallone, Talia Shire and real-life boxer Tommy Morrison.(n)

He makes a shocking discovery about Miranda's demise that leads him back to the cartel in a frantic search for answers and his wild desperation leaves Murtaugh torn between his commitment to his partner and his devotion to his family. Damon Wayans, Clayne Crawford, Kevin Rahm, Floriana Lima and Johnathan Fernandez star in the final episode of this first series of the fast-moving detective drama, though a second run is already in the pipeline.(n)

programme.title: What's It Like to Catch Coronavirus?
programme.desc: The lockdown continues and people practise social distancing in an effort to avoid COVID-19. However, for those who have caught the virus - what is it actually like? With some estimates suggesting up to 80 per cent of the population may be affected, it's vital to understand how the symptoms, from mild to life-threatening, affect individuals. Here, people from all over Britain document their experiences of living with the disease. The personal stories reveal how different people respond in different ways, and how the virus impacts on people's mental and economic health.(n)

programme.title: Spring at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: In any other year, as spring arrives on Jimmy Doherty's farm, his 280-acre park would be teeming with families, eager to see his collection of exotic animals. But 2020 is no ordinary year, and while there are no guests, his animals still need caring for. This documentary, filmed by a small crew, offers a unique insight into how Jimmy and his team are managing. In the first episode, lambs, goats and reindeer are all due to give birth, a camel needs to find its mate and Jimmy builds hides and nesting boxes to keep an eye on what the badgers, birds and fish are getting up to.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity 5 Go Barging
programme.desc: Michael Buerk, Amanda Barrie, Anita Harris and John Prescott set off for a spooky trip through Staffordshire's 1.5-mile-long Harecastle Tunnel. However, Shaun Williamson opts instead to visit the grave of James Brindley, the man who designed the tunnel, but never saw it completed. After joining the Macclesfield Canal, Amanda and Anita head to a barge-based artist's studio for a gentle afternoon of sketching, while Shaun and Michael head to 18th-century folly Mow Cop. This leg of the journey ends at Congleton, homing in on an unsung local heroine of the Suffragette movement.(n)

programme.title: Dogs with Incredible Jobs
programme.desc: Documentary featuring dogs with unusual skills around the world who put their talents to use helping humans and other animals. Among the many animals featured in the series are truffle hunters, bedbug detectors, police dogs, emotional support dogs, sheep dogs, guide dogs, sled pullers, fire fighters, social media stars, mice harvesters, fitness trainers, circus performers, frisbee gamers, trauma counsellors, penguin protectors, tracking dogs, prison guards and snake detectors.(n)

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet

programme.title: Missing or Murdered?
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on the case of 19-year-old Luke Durbin, who vanished in May 2006 after a night out in Ipswich. He was captured on CCTV seemingly trying to find his way home, but he had left his phone and wallet at a friend's house, so taxis refused to take him and there were no buses or trains. For the first time, details about his involvement in drugs and drug-dealing are revealed. Could his disappearance be linked to a turf war?(n)

programme.title: Killer Psychopaths
programme.desc: David Wilson analyses the personality and motivations of serial killer Steve Wright, who was convicted in 2008 of murdering five women who worked as prostitutes in Ipswich, and became known as the Suffolk Strangler. With the aid of first-hand accounts from those involved at the time, including investigating officers, journalists and the killer's father, the criminologist reveals how the dark side of Wright's personality eventually took over.(n)

Plus, the daughter who stole her mother's life savings - leaving her to die penniless - and the disabled single mother who faced financial ruin after her son took more than Â£1,000 from her - when he was only 10 years old.(n)

programme.desc: Documentary following life at Julian Norton and Peter Wright's veterinary practice as they and their team care for animals in the rural communities of North Yorkshire.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity 5 Go Barging
programme.desc: After a death-defying crossing of the Edstone aqueduct, the longest cast iron example in England, Michael Buerk and Shaun Williamson visit a gin distillery to make genuine Elizabethan hooch, while Anita Harris goes foraging for herbs and flavours. Then they meet back at the barges for a gin-tasting session, pitching Shaun's 'Bottom's Up' against Michael's 'Goodnight Sweet Prince'. Then, alongside fellow travellers John Prescott and Amanda Barrie they head up to Stratford and journey's end at the Royal Shakespeare Theatre, where Shaun can finally achieve his life's ambition of playing Stratford.(n)

programme.title: Jo Brand's Cats & Kittens
programme.desc: Inspector Anthony rescues a cat who has given birth under a disused cabin. Cameras also follow Chloe, a cat who has been stuck up a tree for five days, and Jo meets a woman who runs a cat sanctuary at her home.(n)

programme.title: Secrets of Your Supermarket Food
programme.desc: It is thought that more than seven million tons of food is thrown away every year as a result of confusion over food labelling. Here, Environmental Health Officer Gareth Jones helps decipher the difference between 'best before', 'use by' and 'display until'. Sian Williams investigates the safety of supermarket pork, and Stefan Gates finds out about the challenges facing the Scottish salmon industry and also tests the difference between fresh and frozen fish.(n)

programme.title: Blood
programme.desc: The day of the twins' communion has arrived, and the whole Hogan family are reunited for the first time since the events of last year. But as the rest of the family focus on the celebrations, Jim and Paul are dealing with more serious issues.(n)

programme.title: The Town the Gypsies Took Over
programme.desc: Documentary exploring Britain's oldest and most exclusive Gypsy gathering, the Appleby Horse Fair in Cumbria, which is attended by more than 10,000 travellers. The programme explores how new police restrictions are impacting on the festival's traditions, as well as the disruption caused by torrential rain, including a nearby river rising to a dangerous level. Plus, local business owners share their thoughts on the event. While some stand to make a profit from the visitors, others find the size of the fair overwhelming.(n)

programme.title: Bad Girls Behind Bars
programme.desc: Transgender inmate Franklin falls in love with a fellow prisoner, but they must keep their relationship a secret or face being placed in solitary confinement. A fight breaks out over a carton of milk, and a pregnant prisoner trying to recover from heroin addiction faces losing a place on a treatment programme - which could result in her baby being born in prison and taken from her.(n)

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.sub-title: BSL Zone: The Muddy Boot Room
programme.desc: Adam Bassett and his guests discuss deaf football, on and off the pitch.(n)

programme.title: Carry On Regardless (1961)
programme.desc: A businessman starts up an odd-job agency, but employs seven hopeless handymen incapable of completing any task without causing utter chaos. Matters come to a head when their landlord tries to evict them - forcing the bungling workmen to finally prove their worth. Slapstick comedy, starring Sid James, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams.(n)

programme.title: The Ladykillers (1955)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind and his gang come up with a cunning scheme to steal a fortune, but their plan is threatened by the unsuspecting elderly landlady of the boarding house they are staying in. They decide to dispose of her, which proves easier said than done. Classic Ealing comedy, with Alec Guinness, Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Katie Johnson, Cecil Parker, Danny Green and Jack Warner.(n)

programme.title: All That Heaven Allows (1955)
programme.desc: A wealthy New England widow breaks all the taboos of her conservative social circle by falling madly in love with her younger gardener. Her friends and grown-up children are scandalised as she contemplates marrying him, leaving her with a dilemma - to either bow to convention or take a chance at being happy. Romantic drama, with Jane Wyman, Rock Hudson, Agnes Moorehead and Conrad Nagel.(n)

programme.title: Chasing Mavericks (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager discovers a supposedly legendary stretch of shoreline famous for vast waves actually exists. He tracks down a famous surfer and asks for help in developing his skills to the point where he can successfully ride the challenging waters. Fact-based drama, starring Jonny Weston, Gerard Butler and Elisabeth Shue.(n)

programme.title: Footloose (2011)
programme.desc: A teenager from Boston moves to a small conservative town, and discovers the council and a preacher have enforced a ban on loud music and dancing. He openly defies the harsh rules, revitalising the local youth and winning the heart of the reverend's daughter. Remake of the 1984 drama, with Kenny Wormald, Julianne Hough and Dennis Quaid.(n)

programme.title: Chaos (2005)
programme.desc: A veteran cop and his inexperienced new partner are assigned to investigate a bank heist. At first sight, no money appears to have been stolen. However, it eventually emerges the criminal mastermind behind the robbery had a more complex and profitable scheme in mind - and a possible connection to the detective on his trail. Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Ryan Phillippe and Wesley Snipes.(n)

programme.title: Before I Go to Sleep (2014)
programme.desc: A woman who cannot retain her memories following a traumatic accident is contacted by a mysterious neuropsychologist, who offers to help her recover the truth about her condition. As she tries to piece together the events of her past, she begins to fear neither her husband nor the doctor are who they seem to be. Thriller, starring Nicole Kidman, Colin Firth and Mark Strong.(n)

programme.title: Eden (2014)
programme.desc: A literature student abandons his thesis as his DJing career takes off, achieving success in US clubs, but his spending and cocaine habit start catching up with him. Drama, starring Felix de Givry and Pauline Etienne. In French and English.(n)

programme.title: Carry On Spying (1964)
programme.desc: A secret formula is stolen by a sinister organisation masterminded by the evil Dr Crow. The British government plans to assign its top agents to deal with the crisis, but owing to staff shortages, has to settle for a bungling spy and his three hapless trainees. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Cribbins, Jim Dale, Eric Barker and Victor Maddern.(n)

programme.title: The League of Gentlemen (1960)
programme.desc: A former Army colonel, angry at his enforced retirement, sets out to exact an elaborate revenge on society in general. Recruiting seven other former servicemen who have turned to a life of crime, he plans a major bank robbery with military precision. Crime caper, starring Jack Hawkins, Nigel Patrick, Richard Attenborough, Roger Livesey and Bryan Forbes.(n)

programme.title: Gentlemen Prefer Blondes (1953)
programme.desc: Lounge singers Lorelei and Dorothy embark on a transatlantic cruise to Paris in search of rich husbands. While Dorothy falls for a penniless man, Lorelei thinks she has found the millionaire of her dreams, only for his father to hire a private eye to spy on her and prove she is a gold-digger. Howard Hawks' musical comedy, starring Marilyn Monroe, Jane Russell, Charles Coburn and Elliott Reid.(n)

programme.title: Sunshine on Leith (2013)
programme.desc: Two soldiers return home to the Scottish port town after finishing their tour of duty in Afghanistan. While they struggle to adjust to life as civilians, the parents of one of the squaddies prepare to celebrate their 30th anniversary in style. Musical featuring songs by the Proclaimers, starring George MacKay, Kevin Guthrie, Peter Mullan and Jane Horrocks.(n)

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mother's heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover.(n)

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro.(n)

programme.title: Bad Neighbours (2014)
programme.desc: A couple living in suburbia and adjusting to new parenthood are determined to prove they can still be cool when a household of students moves in next door. However, when their raucous neighbours' wild parties disrupt their lives, they decide to fight back, leading to a vicious cycle of one-upmanship. Comedy, starring Seth Rogen, Zac Efron and Rose Byrne.(n)

programme.title: Cell (2016)
programme.desc: A mysterious signal is transmitted to every mobile phone in the world, causing those who hear it to turn into bloodthirsty maniacs. A writer who was unaffected by the transmission bands together with a few other survivors to track down his family and unlock the mystery behind the crisis. Sci-fi thriller based on Stephen King's novel, starring John Cusack and Samuel L Jackson.(n)

programme.title: Carry On Sergeant (1958)
programme.desc: A military sergeant approaching retirement hopes to end his career on a high note by seeing his last lot of recruits come first in an annual competition to find the best squad in the forces. However, he is not prepared for the hopeless band of misfits placed under his command. The first in the comedy series, starring William Hartnell and Bob Monkhouse.(n)

programme.title: The Return of the Musketeers (1989)
programme.desc: D'Artagnan reunites his former companions to save the queen of France from the scheming Cardinal Mazarin, and embark on a mission to England to prevent the beheading of Charles I. Meanwhile, the daughter of a former vanquished enemy is seeking revenge on the four heroes. Swashbuckling adventure sequel, with Oliver Reed, Michael York, Frank Finlay, Richard Chamberlain, Kim Cattrall and Roy Kinnear, who died during filming.(n)

programme.title: Faintheart (2008)
programme.desc: Family man Richard finds solace from his humdrum life in the world of historical battle re-enactments. However, when his hobby sees him spend more time on the battlefield than at home, his wife leaves him for a gym instructor, forcing Richard to reassess his priorities. Romantic comedy, starring Eddie Marsan, Ewen Bremner, Jessica Hynes, Bronagh Gallagher, Tim Healy and Paul Nicholls.(n)

programme.title: Back to the Future Part II (1989)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly travels to the 21st century, where he has to save his children from a terrible fate. However, this proves to have unforeseen consequences when the future version of arch enemy Biff sees a chance to rewrite history for his own benefit, leaving Marty stuck in a twisted parallel universe. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Michael J Fox and Christopher Lloyd.(n)

programme.title: Sahara (2005)
programme.desc: An explorer stumbles upon evidence that an American Civil War battleship, which was laden with treasure when it sank without trace, has ended up somewhere in the Sahara. However, he is deflected from his mercenary quest to find the hoard by an encounter with a tenacious doctor, whose battle to stop the spread of a deadly disease could be linked to his own mission. Adventure, starring Matthew McConaughey, Penelope Cruz and Steve Zahn.(n)

programme.title: Lincoln (2012)
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's biopic of the 16th president of the United States. In his tumultuous final months in office, Abraham Lincoln faces a struggle to bring the Civil War to an end and unite a divided nation, while also bringing about legislation to abolish slavery. Starring an Oscar-winning Daniel Day-Lewis, with Tommy Lee Jones, Sally Field and Joseph Gordon-Levitt.(n)

programme.title: Transporter 3 (2008)
programme.desc: Underworld courier Frank Martin's latest assignment involves transporting the kidnapped daughter of a crooked government minister across Europe on behalf of an eco-terrorist faction. However, a device will kill him if he leaves his car, thugs employed by the politician are out to murder him, and his passenger has a bad case of Stockholm syndrome. Action thriller sequel, with Jason Statham and Natalya Rudakova.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted fills in as Marvin's nanny, but Marshall and Lily realise he is using the baby as a replacement for the real object of his devotion - the Goliath National Bank building. Meanwhile, Robin is determined to get Barney back, no matter what it takes.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin becomes suspicious of Barney's relationship with Patrice, questioning whether he is going through an emotional crisis, and attempts to split them up. Meanwhile, Marshall is shocked to discover his mother has started a new romantic chapter in her life with an unexpected partner.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe are shocked to discover that Lennox's boyfriend Aidan spent the night in her bedroom, but Joe is even more taken aback at Mel's easy-going reaction to the situation. Meanwhile, Ryder's girlfriend Holly declares that it is time for him to start shaving.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: When Joe starts to run Mel's finances, he becomes convinced that her credit card statement reveals that she is having an affair with a married man. Meanwhile, Lennox tries to get along with her friend's new date - until he reveals that he has a crush on her and Ryder tries to decide what to get Holly for her birthday.(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike has the boys over for his legendary ribs, but while he ponders over an argument with Molly he begins to appreciate the company of women.(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike and Carl have a close call with death at work, prompting them to re-evaluate their lives and plan for the future, but too much change takes its toll.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is infuriated when Priya uses her legal knowledge to find a loophole in the room-mate agreement - but his spirits are lifted by a night on the town with Amy, Penny and Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Penny use Bernadette to spy on Leonard and Priya after the couple invite her and Howard to dinner. An experimental drug helps Raj overcome his fear of talking to women, but proves more effective than he had expected. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The family rally round when Erica is dumped by her boyfriend, and Beverly goes in search of a handsome replacement. Barry needs money when he becomes addicted to an arcade game.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray coaches Barry for his first high school wrestling match but keeps it a secret from Beverly, who is sure to disapprove of her son taking part in such a dangerous sport. Adam blackmails Erica into waiting in line with him to buy tickets for the new Stars Wars movie.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While the squad attends a funeral in Los Angeles, Captain Holt learns that he is in the running for his dream job: Commissioner of the NYPD. however, after they miss their return flight to New York, Peralta must find a way to get Holt back in time for his interview. Santiago tries to convince everyone that she can be laid back, Jeffords panics about losing his first-class flight, and Boyle pries into Diaz's personal life.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz begs Peralta to help her break some big news to her parents, but her plan is thrown off track when Mr and Mrs Diaz wrongly assume that their daughter and her colleague are dating. The squad suffers internet problems after the Cyber Crimes Unit move into the office downstairs.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard questions his engineering abilities when he and Sheldon can't get a toy drone to fly. A cancelled flight almost stops Leonard from giving the commencement address at his former high school, while Raj pits his parents against each other when his father cuts him off financially.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: There is a clash of personalities when Sheldon and Leonard's mothers finally meet, while Howard finally decides to do his fair share of the housework - but not without a little help from his friends. Guest starring Christine Baranski and Laurie Metcalf.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox starts an internship at Mel's office and immediately hits it off with someone who happens to work for her biggest political rival, which leads to an accusation of disloyalty. Elsewhere, Joe finally finds a new job in the financial industry, which entails working overnight as an online consultant for a Russian company.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is annoyed when Joe's Russian girlfriend Elena comes to visit and begins to monopolise his time. Meanwhile, Ryder volunteers to help Lennox with an experiment that requires him to eat only vending machine food, but he soon comes to regret his generous offer.(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.sub-title: The Wreck of the Vincent Moranto
programme.desc: Vince sells the boat that he and Mike were remodelling together, causing Mike to revisit memories of empty promises made by his father. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell.(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Fate presents Molly with an opportunity after she finds one of her former fourth-grade students homeless and pregnant.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle organises an elaborate scavenger hunt for Peralta's bachelor party, but the guys take some short cuts that throw the event into disarray. Santiago's bachelorette party goes awry when it comes to light that she once slept with a member of the band that is to play at her wedding reception.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members worry about Diaz when she responds to an active shooter alert, but are instructed to stay back at the precinct building and are powerless to help. Peralta and Boyle try to find ways to assist Diaz, Jeffords has an existential crisis, while Santiago and Gina attempt to repair the broken toilet in the ladies' room.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam breaks his arm and tells his school friends he fell off a hoverboard like the hero in Back to the Future, but the lie threatens his friendship with Emmy Mirsky. Meanwhile, Beverly fears she's being replaced in the kitchen when the family falls in love with the new Chinese restaurant in town. An 11-year old boy captures his family on his video camera as they grow up in the 1980s. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: The Most Handsome Boy on the Planet
programme.desc: Barry is excited when a modelling agency representative approaches him, but Erica thinks it's a scam. Meanwhile, Adam tries to get Murray to build bridges with his father.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy has a date with a mystery man, so Sheldon asks Howard and Raj to help him find a new girlfriend online. When Amy is coy with the details about the guy she's dating, Penny and Bernadette decide to spy on them. Stephen Merchant guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try hanging out as friends when they spend Thanksgiving together at the aquarium. Howard reluctantly agrees to volunteer at a soup kitchen with Bernadette, Raj and Emily. Meanwhile, Penny discovers that Leonard knows more about her than she thought.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam offers to join Kate in adopting a vegan diet in the hope that it will bring them closer together - but finds giving up meat much harder than expected.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle brings Peralta into a case when a psychiatrist reports one of his patients missing, while Santiago believes she has accidentally received a package meant for Jeffords.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Work has become so busy for Peralta and Santiago that they end up celebrating their first wedding anniversary while standing guard over a comatose drugs baron who has been rushed into hospital after being shot.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The lads visit a Caravan Club meeting under the impression that it is really a massive orgy, but are embarrassed when Jay's dad decides to give them advice on sex - whether they like it or not. Sitcom about four teenagers growing up in suburbia, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is put in charge of organising the end-of-term Christmas prom, and tempts fate by enlisting the help of Simon, Jay and Neil. Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison star.(n)

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: It's July 12th and the Quinn family are rushing to get out of town before the Orange Parades start. They are packed and nearly ready to go when James, Michelle and Clare arrive as unexpected members of the escape party. To make matters worse, Aunt Sarah has recently started reading tarot cards and is predicting disaster for this trip - and it seems that for once, she might just be right. The only question is, when and how will things go wrong? Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Jamie-Lee O'Donnell, Dylan Llewellyn and Nicola Coughlan.(n)

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Erin is over the moon when she manages to secure herself the editorship of the school magazine, The Habit. Especially when she uncovers an explosive story. Orla become obsessed by step aerobics, Da Gerry gets into trouble with Ma Mary and love is in the air for Aunt Sarah. Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Louisa Harland, Tommy Tiernan, Tara Lynne O'Neill and Kathy Kiera Clarke.(n)

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Moss has his work cut out protecting Jen from the unwanted attentions of would-be suitor Bill Crouse. Meanwhile, Roy also struggles to fend off an admirer. Comedy, starring Katherine Parkinson, Chris O'Dowd and Richard Ayoade, with Adam Buxton.(n)

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Jen explains she experiences terrible mood swings at a certain time of the month, but when Moss and Roy start displaying similar symptoms she begins to worry for their future - and that of the IT community in general.(n)

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Spencer meddles in Jamie's relationship with Kimberley, but soon finds out how far his friend can be pushed, and Rosie arranges a lunch so that Hugo's new love interest can meet the girls. Meanwhile, Cheska plucks up the courage to ask Richard Dinan to her charity fundraising night, but things go awry when Gabrielle makes a move on the millionaire entrepreneur.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets more than she bargained for when Leonard agrees to meet a psychiatrist on her behalf, while Sheldon and Raj collaborate on an astronomical discovery. Stuart moves out, but Howard and Bernadette's happiness is short-lived. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After being forced to deal with a sick Sheldon, the rest of the gang try to treat themselves to a Sheldon-free weekend. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey is upset when Jeff's chauvinistic father threatens to file an insurance claim against them after injuring his ankle in their house, while Jennifer wants Adam to watch Gone with the Wind. Elsewhere, Russell faces a challenge when a one-night stand refuses to leave his apartment.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: The truth catches up with Audrey and Jeff when they ditch a dinner date with Jennifer and Adam to attend a party, and Timmy tries to keep Russell under control when his womanising ways cause trouble at the same event.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Part one of two. Ted invites his old university professor, who told him he would never make it as an architect, to the grand opening of the GNB building. However, when the academic snubs him saying he does not know who he is, Ted goes back to the campus to confront him, taking the gang along for the ride. While there, Lily and Marshall run into an old acquaintance they would rather have avoided. Guest starring Seth Green and Peter Gallagher.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Part two of two. Barney confides in Ted that he plans to propose to Patrice and swears him to secrecy, but Ted feels he should tell Robin what is happening, and asks her to be his date to the gala opening of the GNB building. Meanwhile, Marshall and Lily enjoy their first night away together since the birth of Marvin and intend to savour every moment, but end up feeling anxious about their son.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: When Mel punches a man who picks on Ryder at the cinema, a clip of the fracas is posted online and she becomes known as 'Battling Burke', much to the delight of her political campaign manager. Meanwhile, Lennox befriends a new girl at school, but she soon takes advantage of his kindness. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do
programme.desc: Mel wants to break up with her boyfriend Donald, but she feels guilty because he has just been fired from his job - so she asks Joe to help boost Donald's confidence before she dumps him. Meanwhile, Holly confides a secret to Lennox, and asks her to keep it from Ryder.(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.sub-title: The Bitter Man and the Sea
programme.desc: Carl rocks the boat at Mike and Molly's anniversary when he brings a date, leaving deep cracks in their friendships.(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike and Carl both ask to be assigned different partners at work, while Molly and Peggy have an opportunity to promote their new book on national radio. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard decides to tell his mother that he and Bernadette are engaged - but she later collapses, making him fear the shock of the news has caused her to suffer a heart attack. As the gang convenes at the hospital, Sheldon's fear of infectious diseases lands him in trouble, while Priya and Penny bond over coffee.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette receives her PhD, and the friends then tease Howard about being the only one among them who is not a doctor. Meanwhile, Raj becomes Sheldon's new flatmate after overhearing Leonard and Priya engaging in a Star Trek bedroom fantasy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kunal Nayyar.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray gets his moment in the spotlight when he is honoured by his old high school for his basketball prowess. While he and Beverly are away from home, Barry takes advantage of their absence to throw a party to impress his school friends.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to express his feelings for Dana by making her a mix tape, but disaster strikes when the tape falls into Beverly's hands. Barry obtains a fake ID and takes it to school to show off to his classmates. David Spade (Rules of Engagement) guest stars, with Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Gangster Seamus Murphy asks Holt to pay back the favour he owes for getting Diaz and Peralta out of jail, so the cops try to help the captain keep his end of the bargain without breaking the law.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: After mobster Seamus Murphy threatens Kevin, Holt devises an elaborate plan to hide his husband in a safe house, with Peralta as his guard. However as the squad members work overtime to find Seamus and take him down, Kevin and Peralta grow miserable with being cooped up alone together.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon presses Leonard and Penny to choose a date for their wedding, while he also has to deal with dramatic changes in his own relationship with Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Elena faces being deported, so Joe offers to marry her so she can stay in the country. Mel refuses to take part in the scheme, but when things begin to go wrong she is forced to protect the couple. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe starts to search for another job as he realises Lennox and Ryder are old enough to look after themselves, however Mel does not want him to go and tries to show him how important he is to her and her family. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Fearing that Frannie has no plans for her life post-pregnancy, Mike and Molly attempt to reconcile her with her estranged sister.(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: The couple need everyone to be on their best behaviour when the adoption agency schedules a home visit.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz and Santiago team up to take down a ruthless killer who has managed to elude them for seven years. Jeffords helps Peralta to tackle the chores on his wedding planning list. Captain Holt and his rival Olivia Crawford try to convince each other to step down from the campaign to become Police Commissioner.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Product designer Rebecca Sturrock has returned to her family home in Cornwall with her partner Gregory Kewish and a highly ambitious plan. Together they hope to transform a small, damp bungalow into a cutting-edge home to share with their twin three-year-old daughters - all for just Â£80,000. The design is radical - to reinforce the walls of the old property and add a new living space on top to take advantage of the views. This extra floor will be made entirely of thick wooden panels engineered in Germany and normally assembled by a crew of specialist installers. However, budget constraints mean the couple are determined to do it all themselves.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman and Laura Hamilton offer their help to Margaret Wagstaff and Keith Turner, who want to spend their retirement somewhere other than Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, but are unable to decide whether they will get more for their money in Cornwall or Collioure, south-west France. Keith has fond memories of family holidays in the West Country, while Margaret is drawn to the artists' paradise of Collioure.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The programme heads to Lowestoft in Suffolk, where Henry Cole picks a valuable Lyons Tea enamel sign while Simon O'Brien converts a station trolley into a garden sofa.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team rummage through the hanger of a Vulcan bomber, where Henry finds a cockpit seat to restore, and Simon attempts to turn part of a jet engine into a coffee table.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick gets to work on the walled garden in the spring and buys a mini tractor for the job - but it may not fit through the gate. Angel designs another suite, with black walls and mosaic mirrors, and decorates the entire dining room with blossoms so a guest can make a special wedding proposal. The couple also consider the possibility of truffle farming.(n)

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Juana and Trevor Jones, who plan to knock down some 300-year-old decrepit barns, and build themselves a stylish retirement home in the Lincolnshire countryside. While sceptical about their ability to do this on a Â£100,000 budget, Charlie soon realises goung over-budget may be the least of the couple's problems. Ex-builder Trevor is determined to be hands-on with the project, and even refuses to down tools when he is facing a life-saving operation.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Five Bells near Dover, where manager Shelley Parnell and her competitive mum Linda Yates hope their bargain-priced B&B will win the day.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts check in to the Thomas Paine Hotel in Thetford, where an inappropriate book is found in a bedside drawer and competition turns fierce at a Home Guard training exercise.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Chris and Sarah Whitehead invite their fellow hoteliers to Tenbury Wells in Worcestershire, where they open the doors of their historic pub The Rose and Crown.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lesley and Steve Hawker welcome the contestants to the Woodlands Guest House in Exmoor, but after the bad feedback of previous rounds, it seems their rivals are out for revenge.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet up to find out what they have been paid. Shelley and Linda from The Five Bells want to know why their feedback for breakfast doesn't add up, while Gez from the Thomas Paine Hotel wants to find out why Shelley and Linda scored him so low. Chris and Sarah from The Rose and Crown want to question Gez, and Steve and Lesley from Woodlands Guest House try to get to the naked truth.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien creates table lamps from old theatre lights and Henry Cole finds a treat for restorer Guy.(n)

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The four remaining amateur potters take part in the semi-final, facing their biggest challenge of the competition so far as they are asked to create a fully functioning toilet. Judges Keith Brymer Jones and Sue Pryke are on hand to test the toilets and make their biggest decision of the series. Who will be leaving the competition and which three potters will go through to the grand finale?(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel look ahead to wedding season, with eight couples booking the chateau for their big day. Dick also converts a stone barn into a flat for Angel's parents, getting rid of 150 years' worth of rubbish in the process, but tensions rise between the couple when he gets carried away with the trees at the front of the property.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: GP Peter Berkin and his wife Chard, an alternative medicine practitioner, have decided to build a new home at the bottom of their garden, near Milton Keynes, but cannot agree on any part of the design - even the basic shape. Peter is a keen hobbyist who wants the house to feature a workshop where he can build a plane, and he's planning to spend twice the Â£200,000 budget Chard has in mind. Kevin McCloud follows their progress.(n)

programme.title: Hunt for the Arctic Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Cameras follow the multimillion-dollar expedition that discovered the Victorian ship HMS Erebus, intact and upright on the Arctic sea floor in September 2014. The story unfolds in the freezing Arctic, where search vessels battled with heavy sea-ice that threatened to stop the search entirely, to the dramatic chain of events that led to the historic discovery.(n)

programme.title: It Was Alright In
programme.desc: With attitudes to feminism, foreigners and family values being somewhat different 40 years ago, the second of two programmes narrated by Matt Lucas focuses on 'good old-fashioned Britishness' on TV in the 1970s. From blacking-up in popular pre-watershed programmes, through to homophobia and xenophobia, the decade seems to have had a different set of manners and morals, and took a casual approach to sexism and racism. Looking back on a selection of surprising clips are the people who made the shows, those who watched them at the time, and younger viewers providing a fresh perspective.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.sub-title: Are You Right There, Father Ted?
programme.desc: The priest offends Craggy Island's Chinese community and pulls out all the stops to convince them that he is not racist - but his efforts end in disaster. Sitcom, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon, Frank Kelly and Pauline McLynn, with Ozzie Yue.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The cleric tries to nurture Chris, the hot favourite to win the King of the Sheep festival, back to top form after he is left shaken by a terrifying encounter. Meanwhile, Dougal becomes convinced Craggy Island is being terrorised by a monster.(n)

Jenson Button drives the Reasonably Priced Car.(n)

programme.title: Mega Air
programme.desc: Britain's biggest airport for air cargo undergoes a mammoth, nerve-jangling runway overhaul. Cameras also follow the emergency pilots who fly to the rescue of stranded packages.(n)

programme.title: Cop Car Workshop
programme.desc: John, Dave and Ros get an excuse to show off their knowledge of the second-hand police car market when end of service service vehicles are put up for auction.(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson spares no expense when he tests the BMW X6. Plus, musician Seasick Steve is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May compete in a 1950s-style race from London to Edinburgh. On the footplate of the A1 Tornado steam train, Jeremy has to feed the boiler with a constant supply of coal, while Richard braves the saddle of a Vincent Black Shadow motorbike and James drives an old Jaguar XK120 as the trio discover what Top Gear might have been like 60 years ago. Michael Schumacher drives the Reasonably Priced Car.(n)

programme.desc: This week Greg Davies and assistant Alex Horne engage in some role-play to assess the success of a throwing task, and Noel Fielding has a sliding session.(n)

programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams headed by David Mitchell and Lee Mack try to hoodwink each other with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. programme.title: Red Dwarf

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In the series finale, Noel Fielding finds an unlikely soul mate, Lolly Adefope shows everyone the money, and Mel Giedroyc bites off more than she can chew.(n)

programme.title: Jon Richardson: Ultimate Worrier
programme.desc: Jon and guests Richard Osman, Jessie Cave and Darren Harriott discuss, categorise and rank worries to do with Modern Living. Has inventing got out of hand? Is magic dead?(n)

programme.title: Medieval Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: Revisiting the killing of brilliant but controversial young playwright Christopher Marlowe, who was stabbed to death in a Deptford lodging house in 1593.(n)

programme.title: Medieval Murder Mysteries
programme.sub-title: Arthur of Brittany: The Boy Who Should Have Been King
programme.desc: Prince Arthur of Brittany, who was subjected to the injustice of his bad uncle, John Plantagenet, the usurper of his throne and crown of England.(n)

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston travels to Portugal to meet leading experts on the Three Secrets of Fatima - a series of visions and prophecies allegedly given by the Virgin Mary to three young shepherds in 1917.(n)

programme.title: Inside Hitler's Killing Machine
programme.desc: Documentary about the Holocaust and some of the key figures involved, beginning with Hjalmar Schacht, who was never a Nazi but played a vital role in Hitler's plans.(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: British bombers are unable to hit their targets precisely and attack German cities under cover of darkness, while the Blitz in Britain brings public demand for revenge strikes, and Arthur Harris takes charge of Bomber Command.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An abandoned railway station near a town in Spain that is home to just 500 people and a record-breaking Arctic facility that goes deep underground.(n)

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: An exploration of the world's most densely inhabited waters, where variations in temperature owing to the year-long cycle of the sun encourage a vast array of marine life, from seals and sharks in the winter, to lobster and salmon in the summer, dolphins in the autumn and the walking handfish in spring. Narrated by David Attenborough.(n)

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James looks at some of the advances in motoring that never caught on, revealing how the petrol engine came to dominate in the 20th century, while concepts for jet engines and steam power fell by the wayside. He also drives an amphibious car and an electric scooter, and takes a ride in the world's fastest driverless car.(n)

programme.title: Wildest Africa
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the wildlife and landscapes of the continent, beginning with the 10,800 square miles of the Okavango Delta in Botswana - the largest inland delta in the world.(n)

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Veteran naturalist David Attenborough explores the fragile marine ecosystem of the coral reef, where all creatures, including the corals themselves, have to fight for survival. From tiny beginnings, the reef grows and develops over hundreds of years, providing support for innumerable animals - yet one storm can threaten the entire community.(n)

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The construction of London's Shard, revealing how it was influenced by the Milan Metro, concrete grain storage in Minnesota and a lifting mechanism in the Venice shipyards.(n)

programme.title: Inside Hitler's Killing Machine
programme.desc: The story of the Ahnenerbe research institute, which was set up to provide scientific backing to Hitler's ideology, through a series of horrific experiments.(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Churchill's plan to attack Germany through Italy. Although considered the simplest military solution, the Allies were to face formidable opposition, while the Americans met the Wehrmacht for the first time. Narrated by Laurence Olivier.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An eerie, empty country village which hides a sad secret, a mysterious tower battered by the elements and a disused railway deep beneath the streets of a city.(n)

programme.title: The Architecture The Railways Built

programme.title: Grayson's Art Club
programme.desc: At this time of national crisis, Grayson Perry sets out to bring the nation together through art. Every week, the Turner Prize-winning artist hosts the show from his studio, where he creates new pieces, leads masterclasses and finds out how other artists, creatives and celebrities have been spending their time in isolation. He also encourages artists and viewers alike to produce visual representations of this unique time, at the end of which he plans to display the art in an exhibition chronicling the changing moods of Britain in isolation. The theme for the opening edition is portraits of a family member or housemate, with comedian Joe Lycett showing off one he has painted.(n)

programme.title: Secrets of Egypt's Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Documentary following archaeologists working to unlock the ancient secrets of Egypt's Valley of the Kings, beginning with the treasures of Tutankhamun's tomb. Val is especially obsessed with one guy, who goes by the name of Loverboy 309. The object of her lust is picking Val up from the house in 40 minutes. Thus begins an evening of hell for the Goodmans, as Val forces them to eat their lamb dinner in record time. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments. Paul and Steve head to Slough to collect wages owed to a freelance worker, but the debtor is less than happy to find the high-court enforcement officers on his doorstep and things get physical.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: House

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.desc: A marine's wife kills an intruder and later claims he tried to rape her. The team embarks on a mystifying wild goose chase through a stack of old case files and eventually discovers the woman was leading a double life while her husband was serving overseas.(n)

programme.desc: A private investigator's murder draws Briscoe and Green toward a case of corruption in a baseball league - where the manager will do anything to ensure his team wins. Detective drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.desc: Briscoe and Green look into the shooting of defence lawyer Vance Grodie, who had just won an acquittal for a suspected cop killer. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baseball star becomes the prime suspect in the murder of his limousine driver, who had been regularly supplying him with steroids. Briscoe and Green's investigation reveals blackmail as the underlying motive for the crime. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The suspected murder of a petty officer turns out to be a ghoulish practical joke - but a genuine death follows shortly afterwards. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ducky identifies two dismembered bodies as those of a prosecutor and a sheriff he worked with on a rape case 10 years previously, and realises he could be the killer's next target. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette.(n)

programme.desc: Detective Eames is forced to re-examine the circumstances behind her officer husband's murder when his former partner is killed on the job, and revisits a life that she thought long buried. Crime drama, starring Kathryn Erbe and Vincent D'Onofrio.(n)

programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the rape of a cellist, and initially believe her conductor is to blame for the attack - especially given his penchant for erotic film-making. However, they soon discover an obsessive stalker is watching her from afar - and will stop at nothing to continue his monitoring. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cabot takes a child abuse case, determined to find evidence that will convict the defendant. Her personal feelings tempt her to bend the rules, leading Stabler and Benson into an illegal search of the victim's home - a move that threatens all of their careers.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A urologist is murdered, and his wife claims she was raped and robbed by the killer. Stabler and Benson suspect the doctor's mistress of being involved - until she too is sexually assaulted, and details of another relationship emerge, shedding light on the culprit's identity. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and another officer team up to track down a serial killer, focusing their investigation on a recently released sex offender - but fresh evidence leads them to believe he may have been wrongly convicted. Concerned that a miscarriage of justice could have occurred, they look over old case files and turn their attention to the suspect's neighbour, a man with employment links in the vicinity of seven murders around the country. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and David Keith.(n)

Crime drama, starring David Caruso.(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team investigates the fate of a woman who was lured into the vice trade by the promise of a career as a model. However, the discovery of a severed leg - which proves to have belonged to a girl reported missing in Nevada - prompts Horatio to call for help from Vegas-based colleague Dr Raymond Langston. The first edition of a three-part CSI crossover, guest starring Laurence Fishburne.(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate an assault on a restaurateur's wife, and find the attack is similar to a rape committed the previous week. They discover a locksmith visited both women's houses before the incident, but when they examine the stolen goods found in his toolbox, a new connection emerges - putting another suspect in the frame. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a man is shot outside a gay club, the detectives' investigations lead to his family, where they discover the wife of the dead man has a turbulent past. Forensic testing connects the victim to the filming of a porn movie - but the team does not expect to find out his spouse is also involved in the industry. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team's search for a serial rapist leads to a suspect who as a child was the victim of the same type of crime at the hands of his father - prompting his lawyer to cite genetics as the reason for his actions. Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek star.(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A mother-of-two is killed when her car is involved in an accident with a stolen vehicle. A man who initially appears to be a heroic passer-by turns out to be the other driver, and the team is left to investigate whether a crime has been committed or if it was just an unfortunate crash. Starring David Caruso.(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A company is suspected of deliberately engineering the deaths of its employees to cash in on their insurance policies - including murdering a luckless caretaker by plunging him into a tank of deadly jellyfish. As the CSIs investigate, Jesse is reunited with a mysterious woman from his past. Crime drama, starring Eddie Cibrian and David Caruso.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order

Their inquiries lead them to a Muslim with strong beliefs - and an extreme dislike of females. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the stabbing of a teacher whose body has been found in a caretaker's cupboard. The hunt for her killer leads to the discovery that she was caught up in a love triangle at school involving a student with multiple identities. Legal drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ducky identifies two dismembered bodies as those of a prosecutor and a sheriff he worked with on a rape case 10 years previously, and realises he could be the killer's next target. Despite Gibbs' attempts to protect him, he is later kidnapped - and the team's search for clues leads to a macabre showdown at a funeral home. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman claims to have witnessed the murder of a sailor, but a lack of physical evidence causes the team to question what actually took place. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a woman whose scantily clad body is found on the Upper East Side. The hunt for her killer leads the team into a web of deceit and blackmail, with a Russian mobster and his son seemingly pulling the strings.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A notorious drug dealer is murdered and suspicion falls on two possible culprits - a priest with a reputation as a vigilante, and the father of a teenager who died of an overdose. programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series focuses on Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong.(n)

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong.(n)

programme.title: Daddy Daycare
programme.desc: Nine men with limited childcare experience, who are either fathers or hope to have children soon, try to improve their skills by working in nurseries, taking on a variety of tasks such as nappy changing and supervising playtime. The first edition follows the efforts of three participants at a south London nursery - Garry, a workaholic whose wife thinks he does not have the patience to look after children, ex-military man Stefan, who takes a tough-love approach, and reluctant father-of-one Jay.(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.sub-title: Jimmy Carr and the Science of Laughter - A Horizon Special
programme.desc: The comedian takes over the science programme in a special episode for BBC's sitcom season, turning it into a chat show with eminent scientists as guests. He talks to them about the nature of laughter, with the studio audiences serving as guinea pigs in his attempt to get to the bottom of what laughter is, what it has to do with comedy, and why human beings find it a pleasurable sensation. The programme reveals that laughter predates the human species and may have played a vital role in our evolution.(n)

programme.title: Storyville
programme.sub-title: Mad Dog - Inside The Secret World of Muammar Gaddafi
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the private life of former Libyan dictator Colonel Muammar Muhammad Abu Minyar al-Gaddafi, revealing his disturbing abuses of power. Filmed across the Pacific, Cuba, Brazil, the US, South Africa and Australia, the programme also considers how Libya's vast oil reserves were a key reason why the 'mad dog', as President Reagan dubbed him, managed to maintain such a strong alliance with the West prior to the Arab Spring that cemented his demise at home and led to his overthrow and death in 2011.(n)

programme.title: Strangerland (2015)
programme.desc: A couple move to a remote town in the Australian Outback, but their new life takes a tragic turn when their teenage children disappear during a dust storm. As the townsfolk mount a search, tension and suspicion rise and public opinion quickly turns against the parents. Thriller, starring Nicole Kidman, Joseph Fiennes and Hugo Weaving.(n)

programme.title: Essex Vendetta (2016)
programme.desc: An ordinary man is drawn into the dangerous world of organised crime as he strives to protect his family. His new life in the Essex underworld leads to him being sent on a murderous mission to Malta, where he discovers his partners in crime are not to be trusted. Crime drama, starring Michael McKell, Kris Johnson and Danniella Westbrook.(n)

programme.title: The Statue (1971)
programme.desc: A linguist's wife sculpts a nude statue of him to celebrate his achievements.
